internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank Times Black product page.
Base reward rate is 2% on domestic transactions and 2.5% on international transactions.
Utility, insurance, education, and government spends are capped at a combined limit of 5,000 points per statement cycle.
Point transfers to Air India Maharaja Club are at a 1:1 ratio with a minimum transfer of 2,000 points.
Priority Pass is provided to both primary and Plus cardholders.
